summary: Completed comprehensive testing of paper reading app with AI-powered contextual word lookup. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. New features (smart PDF extraction, optimized caching) tested successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: All 11 API endpoints working (health, papers CRUD, lookup with caching, batch cache, bookmarks CRUD)
Frontend: Homepage loads with all UI elements
Frontend: Paper creation with text content works
Frontend: Paper reader displays with clickable words
Frontend: Word clicking triggers AI explanations via Gemini 3 Flash
Frontend: Caching system shows 'Instant' badge on repeated clicks
Frontend: Cache count badge updates correctly in header
Frontend: Bookmark functionality saves and displays explanations
Frontend: Bookmarks page shows saved explanations with search
Frontend: PDF upload UI elements present and functional
Caching: O(1) lookup performance with Map-based cache
AI Integration: Gemini 3 Flash generating contextual explanations
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all core functionality working)
